classification_rationale: The Raft InterestRatePositionManager uses rounding-up in share minting: depositing 1 wei cbETH always grants 1 share regardless of total assets, breaking the numerical-invariant that share value should be proportional to assets. By flash-borrowing 6,000 cbETH from Aave, artificially inflating the collateral index, and repeating the 1-wei deposit 60 times, the attacker accumulates 60 wei shares equivalent to 10,050 cbETH. The share-asset-pricing invariant is directly violated by the precision calculation error.
